name: IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_VL
query: SELECT IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B.REASON_GROUP_ID REASON_GROUP_ID, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B.REASON_GROUP_CODE REASON_GROUP_CODE, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B.REASON_GROUP_STATUS_CODE REASON_GROUP_STATUS_CODE, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_TL.REASON_GROUP_NAME REASON_GROUP_NAME, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_TL.REASON_GROUP_COMMENTS REASON_GROUP_COMMENTS, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B, IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_TL WHERE IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_B.REASON_GROUP_ID = IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_TL.REASON_GROUP_ID AND IRC_LC_REASON_GROUPS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
